user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of disciplinary action letter templates with their type and description, so that I can see which letter templates are configured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Disciplinary Letter Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for Template Type ID, Letter type, Description and Task

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a disciplinary letter template's details, so that I can review its content before issuing a letter
acceptance_criteria: Given a disciplinary letter template is listed; When I click View in the Task column; Then the template details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the letter templates list, so that I can see the most current set of templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Disciplinary Letter Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with up-to-date data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to paginate through the letter templates list, so that I can browse all available templates
acceptance_criteria: Given the letter templates list spans multiple pages; When I use the pagination controls; Then the corresponding items are shown with the displayed item count
